reasoning: CLEAN_BULL ribbon with 78-cent spread and strong overnight gap-up (+$3.85 from 704.14 to 707.99) support bullish bias. However, last 3 bars show weakness: 05:45 red with 79% body, 05:50 sharply red with 91% body, 05:55 doji green with only 9% body. Price is at 707.99, essentially AT the 708.03 pivot (4 cents below), indicating consolidation rather than momentum. VIX falling at -5.82% confirms low-volatility environment. Ribbon structure alone warrants bullish lean, but momentum bars and AT-pivot price location limit conviction to moderate levels.
key_observations: CLEAN_BULL ribbon (fast 708.24 > pivot 708.03 > slow 707.46) with 78c spread confirms bullish structure
Last 3 bars show momentum weakness: 2 red consecutive bars (05:45, 05:50) followed by doji green (05:55), indicating pullback or consolidation
Price at 707.99 is 4 cents below pivot 708.03 (essentially AT), 53 cents above slow EMA — structure intact but momentum stalled
Strong overnight gap-up of $3.85 from 704.14 close to 707.99 premarket reflects bullish overnight sentiment
VIX falling at -5.82% (current 19.11, regime MID) supports low-volatility, directionless premarket conditions
